source_intake_record.raw_question_text: \text{White light is incident onto a prism at the angle shown in figure. Violet light emerges perpendicular to the rear face of the prism. The index of refraction of violet light in this glass is } 2.0\% \text{ larger than the index of refraction of red light.} At what angle \phi does red light emerge from the rear face?
